_comment: Per-step cost budget for the core GNC loop (issue #53). Values are nanoseconds PER INTEGRATION STEP for runSimulation, measured by apps/bench (gncsim-bench) as the BEST (minimum) over many iterations — the noise-floor estimate. The CI perf job (.github/workflows/ci.yml -> perf-budget) FAILS if the measured best ns/step for a label exceeds budget * (1 + headroom). The headroom is intentionally generous so the gate flags genuine regressions (e.g. reverting the frames.reserve() that took homing_3dof from ~290 to ~94 ns/step), not run-to-run jitter or slower CI hardware. Re-baseline by updating these numbers in the same change that justifies the regression.
